title: Orientation
note: Canonical participant-facing name is Orientation. July 14 retained only in forensic/history routes via redirects.

segments.title: Welcome and why we organize on campuses
segments.short_explanation: Block Street helps communities organize so young people can build lasting civic power — starting where they already are.
presenter_notes: Name Orientation as the standard entry.
participant_text: Tonight is Orientation — the starting path for every new participant.

segments.title: Choose student or county path
segments.short_explanation: Students enter College Community. Others can enter County Community — both stay available.
participant_text: Pick the path that fits you. You can switch later.

segments.title: Enter your College Community
segments.short_explanation: Your school’s College Community is the home for teams, roles, events, and next steps.
presenter_notes: Emphasize invite people you already know.
participant_text: Find your school and open its College Community.

segments.title: How campus leadership works
segments.short_explanation: College Communities organize through simple teams — operations, events, media, outreach, registration, support, and data.
presenter_notes: Return to the college page quickly.
participant_text: See how teams support each other.

segments.title: Campus teams we need to build
segments.short_explanation: Seven campus teams cover the work needed before school starts.
presenter_notes: Click into Voter Registration and Social/Events.
participant_text: Pick a team that fits how you like to help.

segments.title: Leadership and volunteer positions
segments.short_explanation: Every role has a clear next action. Interest is a conversation — not an appointment.
presenter_notes: Open one leadership and one volunteer role.
participant_text: Explore at least one position in depth.

segments.title: First-week voter-registration drive
segments.short_explanation: Prepare a lawful, campus-ready registration drive for the first week back — permissions and compliance are gates.
presenter_notes: Keep registration metrics separate from VCI.
participant_text: Review readiness and pick one VR help action.

segments.title: Campus social networking event
segments.short_explanation: A welcoming social experience that helps people meet, learn lightly, and choose a next step.

segments.title: Bring five people from your school
segments.short_explanation: Start with people you already know at school — friend, classmate, roommate, org member, faculty/staff contact.
participant_text: Identify five people and prepare one invitation.

segments.title: Choose a role and immediate next step
segments.short_explanation: Leave with one concrete action tied to your College Community.
participant_text: Pick your next step and complete Orientation.
